name: CLASSIC SINGLE-BREASTED THREE-PIECE SUIT
description:
Prince Esquire classic single-breasted three-piece suit — a complete jacket, waistcoat, and trouser ensemble tailored for weddings, galas, and executive occasions.

Key features:
• Complete three-piece set: coordinated jacket, waistcoat (vest), and trousers.
• Single-breasted jacket with clean two-button closure and notch lapels.
• Single-breasted waistcoat in matching classic suiting.
• Premium solid fabric with refined drape and structure.
• Flap hip pockets, welt breast pocket, and tailored trouser with sharp crease.
• Available sizes S–3XL as a full three-piece coordinated set.

Available sizes S–3XL (jacket, waistcoat & trouser set). Tailored at Prince Esquire for weddings, galas, and executive occasions.

name: GROOMSMAN PEAK LAPEL TUXEDO THREE-PIECE
description:
Peak-lapel groomsman tuxedo three-piece — wedding, prom, and formal party ready with full waistcoat coordination.

Key features:
• Tuxedo-level peak-lapel jacket.
• Matching formal waistcoat.
• Coordinated slim trousers.
• Groomsman and prom formal staple.
• Complete three-piece celebration set.

Available sizes S–3XL (jacket, waistcoat & trouser set). Tailored at Prince Esquire for weddings, galas, and executive occasions.

name: NAVY PEAK LAPEL BUTTONED THREE-PIECE
description:
Navy peak-lapel buttoned three-piece — structured formal tailoring with waistcoat layer for executive and wedding dressing.

Key features:
• Deep navy suiting with peak lapels.
• Buttoned jacket front with clean lines.
• Matching waistcoat with V-neck cut.
• Coordinated trousers with sharp crease.
• Premium Prince Esquire formal construction.

Available sizes S–3XL (jacket, waistcoat & trouser set). Tailored at Prince Esquire for weddings, galas, and executive occasions.
